LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS PAUL WERMER, CAROL BROWNSON'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND APPOINT A REFEREE AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 24, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE A COPY OF THE STAMPED PLANS AS SOON AS POSSIBLE PER THE REPRESENTATION OF HER COUNSEL MR. POLITO. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH REGARDING THE COORDINATION OF THE CONSTRUCTION. DESPITE THE LANGUAGE OF 7.9 OF THE ACCESS AGREEMENT, WRITTEN AND ORAL COMMUNICATION BETWEEN THE PARTIES AND CONTRACTORS MAY BE NECESSARY TO EFFECTUATE THE OVERARCHING PURPOSE OF THE ACCESS AND SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFFS PAUL WERMER AND CAROL BROWNSON'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND APPOINT A REFEREE AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 3, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE KAHN. THE PARTIES ARE TO CONTINUE TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH REGARDING THE CONSTRUCTION. PLAINTIFF MAY FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF BY NOVEMBER 16, 2012, AND IDENTIFY ANY OUTSTANDING CONTROVERSIES BETWEEN THE PARTIES. DEFENDANT MAY FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION BY NOVEMBER 27, 2012. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS PAUL WERMER, CAROL BROWNSON'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT AND APPOINT A REFEREE AND FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES. THE MOTION TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT AND APPOINT A REFEREE IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NEITHER SIDE IS ENTITLED TO ATTORNEY'S FEES AND DEFENDANT IS NOT ENTITLED TO LIQUIDATED DAMAGES. BOTH SIDES HAVE BREACHED THE COOPERATION REQUIREMENTS OF 7.10 OF THE ACCESS AGREEMENT, WHICH IS INCORPORATED INTO THE PARTIES' SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-18-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bruce T. Burke, Esq. of Burke & Kessler, Tel. 510.444.8100, for Plaintiff and moving party;
James B. Kraus, Esq. of Zacks & Freedman, Tel. 415.956.8100, for Defendant and opposing party;
Stuart L. Eisler, Esq. of Lober Greenfield & Polito, LLP, Tel. 415.986.0688, for Defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter re: attorneys fees was argued. At the conclusion of arguments, the court adopted its tentative ruling on PLAINTIFFs PAUL WERMER, CAROL BROWNSON's Motion To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees. The motion to enforce the settlement and appoint a referee is denied without prejudice. Neither side is entitled to attorney's fees and defendant is not entitled to liquidated damages. Both sides have breached the cooperation requirements of 7.10 of the Access Agreement, which is incorporated into the parties' settlement agreement. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Dec-03-2012 Continued To Jan-04-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRUCE T.H. BURKE, ESQ., 510.444.8100, FOR PLAINTIFFS PAUL WERMER AND CAROL BROWNSON.
ANDREW ZACKS, ESQ., 415.956.8100 AND STUART L. EISLER, ESQ., 415.986.0688, FOR DEFENDANT SALLY UNTERBERGER.
SCOTT A. REINSTEIN, ESQ., 415.981.5411, FOR DEFENDANT DAVID GUERDAT.

RULING: Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFFS PAUL WERMER, CAROL BROWNSON'S Motion To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees is continued to January 4, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Counsel is ordered to prepare and file statement re: status of project no later than December 27, 2012. Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Oct-24-2012 Continued To Dec-03-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bruce T. H. Burke, Esq. of Burke and Kessler, Tel. 510.444.8100, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS PAUL WERMER and CAROL BROWNSON'S Motion To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees is continued to December 3, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302 to be heard by Judge Kahn. The parties are to continue to meet and confer in good faith regarding the construction. Plaintiff may file a supplemental brief by November 16, 2012, and identify any outstanding controversies between the parties. Defendant may file a supplemental opposition by November 27, 2012. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Sep-21-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: BRUCE BURKE, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF BURKE KESSLER, 510.444.8100, FOR PLAINTIFF PAUL WERMER.
JAMES KRAUS, ESQ., ZACKS & FREEDMAN, 415.956.8100, FOR DEFENDANT SALLY UNTERBERGER.

RULING: NO ARGUMENT. The Court CLARIFIED AND adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFs PAUL WERMER, CAROL BROWNSON's Motion To Enforce Settlement And Appoint A Referee And For Costs And Attorneys' Fees is continued to October 24, 2012. Defendant is ordered to provide a copy of the stamped plans as soon as possible per the representation of her counsel Mr. Polito. The parties are ordered to meet and confer in good faith regarding the coordination of the construction. Despite the language of 7.9 of the Access Agreement, written and oral communication between the parties and contractors may be necessary to effectuate the overarching purpose of the access and settlement agreements. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.
